\tzpentry{ID5841}{Rotation Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5841 introduces Rotation Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} h_{\mu\nu}^{(rotation)} = \frac{1}{c^2}\begin{pmatrix} (\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r})^2 & -(\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r})^T \\ -(\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r}) & \mathbf{0}_{3\times3} \end{pmatrix} \end{equation}
